title: Better Vanilla
body:
(For extra features [Better Vanilla (Extra)](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/better-vanilla-(extra))

Better Vanilla is a combined texture pack made from multiple packs, designed to make Minecraft look and feel clearer, cleaner, and more polished while staying true to the vanilla style.

The pack subtly adjusts visuals to improve readability, consistency, and contrast, so everything feels more logical and easier to understand without losing the classic Minecraft look.

Features:

* Smaller fire to reduce screen obstruction

* Reduced end crystal effects

* Smaller items for a clearer view

* Subtle shield and totem animations

* Improved colors and contrast for all materials, helping blocks and items stand out more   naturally

* Better End theme

* Better weather

* Better chests

Perfect for players who want a smoother, clearer Minecraft experience with visuals that feel familiar, balanced, and refined.
Works on many Minecraft Java versions.
* The pack might be incompatible (made for an older version), don't worry about that
* If you find a bug or have any suggestions, join the Discord server. [Support](https://discord.gg/hzGPjeh2kK)

(The packs i used)
[Fancy End](https://www.planetminecraft.com/texture-pack/fancy-end-end-aesthetic-overhaul/)
[Darker Diamonds](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/darker-diamonds)
[Better Chainmail Armor](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/better-chainmail-armor)
[Shinier Copper](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/shinier-copper)
[It's Real Gold](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/its-real-gold)
[tin iron](https://www.planetminecraft.com/texture-pack/tin-iron-replacement/)
[Purpurite](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/java-purpurite)
[Soft Weather](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/soft-weather/version/1.0)
[Chests Reimagined](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/chests-reimagined)
